username.description: Pabbly Subscriptions Billing account username. Sent via HTTP Basic auth.

password.description: Pabbly Subscriptions Billing account password. Sent via HTTP Basic auth; never logged.

base_url.description: Pabbly Subscriptions Billing API base URL override for tests or proxies.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
